title: elaeagnus conferta var. mollis
intro: Elaeagnus conferta var. mollis, also known as Pittosporum-like Silverberry, is a variety of the Elaeagnus conferta shrub native to Hawaii and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaeagnus conferta var. mollis include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, such as colds and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in topical applications to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
